Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rhematek Production Shield - Dockploy compatible deployment

- Updated docker-compose.yml to use port 8001 \(8000 in use\)
- Added redis-tools and netcat to Dockerfile for health checks
- Improved docker-entrypoint.sh with robust service waiting
- Added health check endpoints \(/api/health/, /api/health/deep/\)
- Added custom branded error pages \(404, 500, 403, 429\)
- Added load testing script \(Locust\)
- Added security audit script
- Added server setup automation
- All init commands run automatically on docker compose up

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v2.2.0: Rhematek Production Shield + One-Command Dockploy Deployment

BREAKING: Single command deployment now handles everything automatically

Features:
- One-command Dockploy deployment: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
- Auto migrations, static files, superuser creation, demo data seeding
- Updated dependencies: Django 5.1.4, Celery 5.4.0, React 18.3.1
- Security middleware: XSS sanitization, honeypot, CSRF enhancement
- Comprehensive test suite with pytest fixtures
- Load testing with Locust \(500K concurrent users target\)
- Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack
- PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7.4 + PgBouncer connection pooling

Documentation:
- Simplified README with one-command deployment section
- Updated DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE for Dockploy
- Removed 12+ outdated MD files
- Added API_DOCUMENTATION.md, SECURITY_AUDIT_REPORT.md

Security:
- Fixed bandit MD5 hash issue \(usedforsecurity=False\)
- Updated cryptography to 44.0.0
- Rate limiting, brute force protection, 2FA support

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

EOF

Pages updated:
- about.html: New mission/vision/values sections with team grid
- services.html: Service cards with icons and testimonials
- pricing.html: Pricing cards with toggle and FAQ accordion
- contact.html: Contact form with info sidebar
- blog.html: Blog grid with search and newsletter CTA

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Update website views to serve React SPA instead of HTML templates
